title: viola × contempta nothosubsp. bohemica
intro: Viola × contempta nothosubsp. bohemica, also known as Bohemian pansy, is a hybrid of Viola odorata and Viola montana, and is a nothosubspecies of the genus Viola. It is a perennial plant that has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bohemian pansy include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant activity, making it a valuable herb for promoting overall well-being. Bohemian pansy can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support health and vitality.
